title: MET4
content:
MET4

http://responsivevoice.org

implement online forum

3rd person narrative in every story to either introduce or help with a way in - will be something like ‘MVSFED’ - the AI is ‘inventing’ narrative about characters and once the narrative is invented the character is thus birthed into the social network and thus exist outside of ANON (transfer from purely software to hardware). The representations of what the ANON’s are seeing with their consciousness are just machines synthesized when MVS writes about them.

the generations before the mods were the titans and the giants (the last bit of mankind that invented the immortal mods).

the tale of how jov came to power

groups of woman in threes - fates, furies, etc

generational curse, the tale of two opposing bloodlines


the language might seem cumbersome, but it is until you learn it and then it will start singing in your head. its my attempt at slowing the reader down in order to devour and understand every word.
